title: site/auth GitHub OAuth hub scaffold (Docker, env, UI)
body:
Shared GitHub OAuth hub for tracker, nexus, and pckg.

## Landed

- `site/auth/` TanStack app with Docker, compose, `.env.example` (May 26–27)
- Auth/Tracker refactor (`801f1e2`) — session routes and hub handoff
- Autopairing flow (`574a84c`) and package sync (`870ef7b`)
- Observability pass (`bc9f2e0`)
- Platform-spec issuer doc: [`platform-spec/tooling/auth-hub/`](https://beskid-lang.org/platform-spec/tooling/auth-hub/) (issuer `beskid-auth-hub`, `AUTH_HUB_*` contract)

## Remaining (production)

- OpenBao → Coolify sync for `secret/beskid/production/auth` across consumers
- End-to-end OAuth handoff on production domains (tracker, nexus, pckg)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`801f1e2`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/801f1e2) (2026-06-03)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`
